# Pixelio

> סוכנות אתרים לעסקים בישראל. בונה אתרים מקצועיים שמביאים לקוחות — לא רק נראים טוב.

## About
Pixelio builds high-converting websites for businesses in Israel. Hebrew RTL optimized, mobile-first, fast loading, SEO-ready, and GEO-optimized for AI search engines.

## Services
- Basic Package (1,900 ₪): Single-page website + WhatsApp integration + Basic SEO
- Plus Package (3,900 ₪): Multi-page website + Google My Business + Logo + Floating WhatsApp + Domain migration + Full SEO + GEO
- Premium Package (6,900 ₪): Everything in Plus + Lead form + 30 days free maintenance + Advanced SEO + GEO + Custom keyword strategy
- Maintenance Add-on: 249 ₪/month

## Contact
- WhatsApp: +972587122010
- Website: https://pixelio.co.il

## Target Audience
Businesses in Israel — hair salons, restaurants, therapists, local service providers, e-commerce startups, established companies.
